basic_details.job_title: Telangana Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 242 Anganwadi Teacher & Helper Posts in Adilabad District
basic_details.organization_name: Department of WCD&SC, Adilabad (ICDS Projects Narnoor & Utnoor)
basic_details.short_information: Good news for unemployed women in Adilabad district. The Department of Women Development, Child Welfare and Disabled & Senior Citizens (WCD&SC), Adilabad, has issued notifications for Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and Anganwadi Helper/Ayah (AWH) posts under the ICDS Projects of Narnoor and Utnoor. As per the notification, a total of 63 Teacher posts and 179 Ayah posts are vacant across four mandals. The District Welfare Officer, WCD&SC Adilabad, released the individual mandal-wise and Anganwadi Center (AWC)-wise vacancy lists on 07.07.2026, with applications to be submitted online from 09.07.2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 35 years

qualification.details: Indian. | Candidates must possess the relevant certificates corresponding to the reservation category (SC/ST/BC/General) as applicable to the specific Anganwadi Center vacancy.

selection_process: Not officially detailed in the notification beyond the following: candidates meeting the eligibility criteria for each Anganwadi Center will be considered
SSC-passed candidates will be selected only if no Intermediate-qualified candidate is available for that center.
how_to_apply: Locate the Adilabad district Anganwadi Teacher/Helper recruitment notification for the relevant mandal (Gadiguda, Narnoor, Indervelly, or Utnoor).
Check the AWC-wise vacancy and reservation details for your area.
Fill in the online application with the required personal and educational details.
Upload the necessary certificates and submit the application before the last date.
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted online only, through wdcw.tg.nic.in. Candidates should apply for the specific Anganwadi Center and mandal for which they hold the requisite reservation category certificate. The online application window is open from 09.07.2026 to 20.07.2026. ICDS officials have indicated that recruitment notifications for Anganwadi posts in remaining rural areas of Adilabad district are likely to follow shortly.

all_official_links.label: Download Adilabad Anganwadi Vacancy Details 2026 PDF

content_sections.heading: Notification PDF & Official Source
content_sections.text: The mandal-wise and AWC-wise vacancy lists (Notification Nos. A2/386/NRN-GDG-AWT-01/2017, A2/386/NRN-NRN-AWT-01/2017, A2/386/UTN-IND-AWT-01/2017, and A2/386/UTN-UTN-AWT-01/2017, along with their corresponding AWH notifications) have been issued by the District Welfare Officer, WCD&SC, Adilabad, dated 07.07.2026. A direct notification PDF download link has not been provided in the source; candidates can apply through the official website wdcw.tg.nic.in . Download Adilabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 PDF Download Adilabad Anganwadi Vacancy Details 2026 PDF Official Website: Check here

content_sections.heading: Adilabad Anganwadi Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: The vacancies are distributed across Gadiguda and Narnoor mandals (under ICDS Project Narnoor), and Indervelly and Utnoor mandals (under ICDS Project Utnoor), as follows: Individual Anganwadi Center (AWC)-wise vacancy lists including AWC ID, AWC name, and reservation category (SC/ST/BC/General) for each of the 242 posts have been issued separately for Gadiguda, Narnoor, Indervelly, and Utnoor mandals by the District Welfare Officer, WCD&SC, Adilabad. Most of the notified posts are reserved for ST candidates, with a smaller number reserved for SC candidates.

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Indian. Candidates must possess the relevant certificates corresponding to the reservation category (SC/ST/BC/General) as applicable to the specific Anganwadi Center vacancy.

rows.qualification: Intermediate pass; if no Intermediate-qualified candidate is available, SSC (10th)-passed candidates will be considered for selection

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum age: 18 years Maximum age: 35 years

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Not officially detailed in the notification beyond the following: candidates meeting the eligibility criteria for each Anganwadi Center will be considered, and for AWH posts, SSC-passed candidates will be selected only if no Intermediate-qualified candidate is available for that center.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Adilabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official website wdcw.tg.nic.in . Locate the Adilabad district Anganwadi Teacher/Helper recruitment notification for the relevant mandal (Gadiguda, Narnoor, Indervelly, or Utnoor). Check the AWC-wise vacancy and reservation details for your area. Fill in the online application with the required personal and educational details. Upload the necessary certificates and submit the application before the last date.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online only, through wdcw.tg.nic.in. Candidates should apply for the specific Anganwadi Center and mandal for which they hold the requisite reservation category certificate. The online application window is open from 09.07.2026 to 20.07.2026. ICDS officials have indicated that recruitment notifications for Anganwadi posts in remaining rural areas of Adilabad district are likely to follow shortly.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are available in Adilabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 242 vacancies are available, including 63 Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) posts and 179 Anganwadi Helper/Ayah (AWH) posts under ICDS Projects Narnoor and Utnoor.

faq.question: Q2. Which department has released the Adilabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: The recruitment notification has been released by the Department of Women Development, Child Welfare and Disabled & Senior Citizens (WCD&SC), Adilabad under ICDS Projects.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Adilabad Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for Anganwadi Teacher (AWT) and Anganwadi Helper/Ayah (AWH) posts should have passed Intermediate (12th standard). For AWH posts, if Intermediate-qualified candidates are not available, SSC (10th) pass candidates may be considered.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Adilabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years and the maximum age limit is 35 years for both Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the last date to apply for Adilabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates can submit their online applications from 09 July 2026 to 20 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for Adilabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates have to apply online only through the official WCD Telangana website at wdcw.tg.nic.in.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Adilabad Anganwadi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection will be based on the eligibility criteria of candidates for the respective Anganwadi Center. The official notification has not provided a detailed selection process.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary or remuneration for Adilabad Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts?
faq.answer: The notification has not specified the remuneration details for Anganwadi Teacher and Helper posts.
